data.title: Analysts predict WIF to reach $0.60-$0.75 by April 2026 from $0.18, driven by bullish momentum and on-chain support.
data.description: Analysts are predicting a bullish trend for WIF, with the price currently at $0.18 and showing support at this level. If the resistance is broken, experts forecast a potential increase to $0.60-$0.75. On-chain accumulation further strengthens the outlook, in line with the dogwifhat forecast.

data.title: Huawei Site Power Solution Wins Frost & Sullivan's Global Best Practices Award
data.description: In Shenzhen, China on March 31, 2026, Huawei was honored by Frost & Sullivan with the Global Best Practices Award for their outstanding contributions to advancing the implementation and industrialization of cutting-edge Virtual Power Plant (VPP) technologies within the telecom power sector. The award recognition highlights Huawei's excellence in this field.

data.title: PEPE price caution with RSI at 44.21, bearish MACD; sideways consolidation expected with breakout levels in April 2026.
data.description: The Price-Earnings to Price-Earnings Growth (PEPE) indicator is currently indicating a neutral stance at 44.21. However, the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) momentum indicator is showing a bearish trend, indicating that the market may experience sideways consolidation in April 2026. Investors should pay attention to key breakout levels during this period to make informed decisions.

data.title: Oracle introduces AI restaurant management tool for Simphony Cloud users, integrating inventory, scheduling, and cash management with AI for global hospitality industry. #technews
data.description: NetSuite Restaurant Operations by Oracle integrates inventory, scheduling, and cash management using AI-driven workflows, benefiting hospitality businesses globally. This software streamlines operations, boosts efficiency, and enhances customer service. With an extensive reach, it caters to restaurants worldwide, offering a comprehensive solution to manage various aspects of the business. The AI-powered features ensure optimized performance and seamless integration, facilitating smooth operations and improved profitability.

data.title: Tech Mahindra and ParkourSC Partner to Deliver AI-Powered Digital Supply Chain Solutions for Global Enterprises
data.description: Tech Mahindra, a leading global provider of technology consulting and digital solutions, has revealed a new partnership with ParkourSC. This collaboration aims to leverage the expertise of both companies in the industry. Based in Pune, India, Tech Mahindra operates on a global scale, while ParkourSC is situated in San Jose, California. The companies are expected to combine forces to enhance their capabilities and offerings in the technology sector.

data.title: Interactive Brokers Launches Crypto-Asset Trading for Individual Investors in the European Economic Area
data.description: Interactive Brokers has introduced crypto-asset trading for individual investors within the European Economic Area. The launch expands trading options for customers in the region, allowing them to access cryptocurrency markets. This move underscores the company's commitment to providing diverse investment opportunities. The introduction of crypto trading is expected to attract a significant number of new customers and increase overall trading volumes within the platform.
